title: Laundry Day
content: Saturday was laundry day for Mia. She carried a large basket of clothes down to the laundry room in her apartment building. The room was warm and smelled like soap. While the washing machines worked, Mia sat nearby and read a magazine. An older neighbor started a friendly conversation about the weather. After washing and drying everything, Mia folded her clothes carefully and carried them back upstairs. Although laundry was boring, she liked the feeling of fresh, clean clothes waiting in her closet afterward.
